channel.title: Can frontity app be deployed to AWS Amplify Hosting?
channel.description:
Hi,
I was wondering if anyone knows if a Frontity app can be deployed to AWS Amplify hosting?
According to the AWS website - AWS Amplify Hosting is a fully managed CI/CD and hosting service for fast, secure, and reliable static and server-side rendered apps that scale with your business. Supports modern web frameworks such as React, Angular, Vue, Next.js, Gatsby, Hugo, Jekyll, and more.
https://aws.amazon.com/amplify/hosting/
Could this be an alternative to Vercel? And has anyone got any experience with doing this?
Thanks, Niall

item.title: Can frontity app be deployed to AWS Amplify Hosting?
item.dc:creator: mckenna.niall
item.description:
Hi,

I was wondering if anyone knows if a Frontity app can be deployed to AWS Amplify hosting?

According to the AWS website - AWS Amplify Hosting is a fully managed CI/CD and hosting service for fast, secure, and reliable static and server-side rendered apps that scale with your business. Supports modern web frameworks such as React, Angular, Vue, Next.js, Gatsby, Hugo, Jekyll, and more.

Amazon Web Services, Inc.

AWS Amplify Hosting | Fast & Secure Web Hosting | Amazon Web Services

AWS Amplify Hosting provides the easiest way to deploy and host fast, secure, and reliable web apps that scale with your business. Built on AWS.

Could this be an alternative to Vercel? And has anyone got any experience with doing this?

Thanks,
Niall

Read full topic
item.source: Can frontity app be deployed to AWS Amplify Hosting?
